seo.title: Become an Honorary Member - AI Governance Circle
seo.description: Working in AI? Join the Governance Circle as an Honorary Member and help shape responsible AI governance.

hero.title: Become an Honorary Member
hero.subtitle: Working in AI? Join the Circle and help shape the responsible governance of tomorrow.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Share your expertise, ideas, and feedback to improve AI governance practices.

participate.title: Participate
participate.description: Speak at events, webinars, and workshops. Shape the product roadmap.

access.title: Access
access.description: Full access to all portal modules (Expert level), Honorary badge, priority visibility in the directory.

eligibility.title: Who can apply?
eligibility.description: Consultants, researchers, engineers, lawyers, ethicists, data/AI leaders: any professional working in artificial intelligence is invited to apply.

form.title: Submit my application
form.motivation: In a few lines, how would you like to contribute to the Circle?

success.title: Application sent!
success.message: Thank you! Your application has been received. Our team will contact you within 48 hours.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.network: Connection error. Check your Internet connection.
